rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND L. MAR REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
rulings.Rulings: Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 30, 2021, Line 1, RESPONDENT VERONICA LIGNE MAR's MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS: Off calendar. Pursuant to SFLR 14.10, all Probate law and motion matters including discovery motions are heard in the Probate Department. =(302/JPT)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES WON LING BONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion By Petitioner Mary Bong To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions (Added For Posting Of The Tentative Ruling)
rulings.Rulings: [1 or 2] This tentative is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. The Motion by Petitioner Mary Bong to Compel Further Discovery Responses and Request for Sanctions contains four separate motions: (1) a motion compelling Respondent to serve further and complete responses to Petitioner's first set of Specially Prepared Interrogatories; (2) a motion compelling Respondent to serve further and complete responses to Petitioner's first set of Form Interrogatories; (3) a motion compelling Respondent to serve further and complete responses to Petitioner's first set of Requests for Admission; and (4) a motion compelling Respondent to produce documents responsive to Petitioner's Request for Production of Documents. Additionally, Petitioner's motion requests sanctions for each of these vehicles. Each discovery motion must be limited to a single discovery vehicle and must be set forth in separate pleadings. Each motion is governed by different rules, merits separate analysis, and will be resolved by separate orders. This Motion is continued by the Court's own motion as follows: Petitioner's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Petitioner's First Set of Form Interrogatories is continued to 2:00 p.m. on December 8, 2021. Petitioner's Motion to Compel Further Production to Petitioner's First Set of Requests for Production of Documents is continued to 2:00 p.m. on December 8, 2021. Petitioner's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Petitioner's First Set of Specially Prepared Interrogatories is continued to 2:00 p.m. on December 15, 2021. Petitioner's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Petitioner's First Set of Requests for Admission is continued to 2:00 p.m. on December 15, 2021.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES WON LING BONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Petitioner Mary Bong To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The date of the Notice of Motion by Petitioner Mary Bong to Compel Further Discovery Responses and Request for Sanctions shall be deemed to be the date of the Notice for each of the four separate motions: (1) Petitioner's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Petitioner's First Set of Specially Prepared Interrogatories; (2) Petitioner's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Petitioner's First Set of Form Interrogatories; (3) Petitioner's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Petitioner's First Set of Requests for Admission; and (4) Petitioner's Motion to Compel Further Production to Petitioner's First Set of Requests for Production of Documents for purposes of CCP Sections 2030.300(c), 2031.210(c), and 2033.290(c). Petitioner is ordered to file four separate and complete motions, one for each individual discovery device to which she seeks to compel further responses or production. Each separate motion must be wholly complete and independently include required supplemental filings for each separate motion. Filed documents encompassing information for more than one motion (such as a single memorandum of points and authorities or a single separate statement for both the motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories and the motion to compel further production of documents) will not be considered. The Court advises the parties to include in the new filings information on any additional reasonable and good faith attempts to resolve informally the issues presented by the motions. Filing dates for the separate motions, separate oppositions if any, and separate replies if any, shall be in accordance with CCP Section 1005. Two courtesy copies of all filings shall be delivered to the Court, attention Probate Law and Motion, pursuant to San Francisco Superior Court Local Rule 14.10(A)(2). The Court advises the parties to adhere to CRC 3.1110(f)(3) when preparing exhibits to courtesy copies.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES WON LING BONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash And For Discovery Protective Order Regarding Document Subpoenas And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: This tentative is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. The Motion to Quash and for Discovery Protective Order Regarding Document Subpoenas and Monetary Sanctions is continued to December 8, 2021, at 2:00 p.m. by the Court's own motion.
